title: SDP codes metadata schema

fields.name: column_name
fields.description: Column name in the data file that uses this code.

fields.name: code_label
fields.description: Human-readable label corresponding to the code.

fields.name: code_description
fields.description: Longer description of what the code means.

fields.name: vocabulary_iri
fields.description: IRI for the controlled vocabulary system that defines valid values.

fields.name: term_iri
fields.description: IRI for the specific term that code_value represents.

sdp:rowRule: One row per allowed code value in a categorical column.
sdp:condition: Required when any column_dictionary.csv row has column_role equal to categorical.
